install.name: Youjoomla Multitabs Modules
install.author: Youjoomla.com
install.description: PLEASE GO TO YOUJOOMLA MULTITAB MODULE FOR DESCRIPTION

param.name: is_copy
param.label: IS THIS A COPY?
param.description: You can add up to 4 copy's. Use following suffixes: 2 ,3, 4, 5. If this is first copy just add number 2 and hit Apply. Last copy that can be used is number 5

param.name: module_pozi
param.label: Mutlitab modules
param.description: Enter modules you want to display seperated by comma.Note:The modules must be published on All pages. Suggestion:Create addtional module positions like , tab1 , tab2 and use these. For Joomla1.0 go to Site - Template Manager - Module Positions and create new ones, for Joomla 1.5 open templatedetails.xml , find positions tag and add your new module positions

param.name: module_title
param.label: Accordion tabs title
param.description: Enter titles in same order as modules above seperated by comma

param.name: auto_width
param.label: Automated Mutlitab title width
param.description: To be used if Automated with is off:Define width in pixels or percentage:Divide 100 by number of titles

param.name: ulis_width2
param.label: Mutlitab title width if Automated is Off
param.description: To be used if Automated with is off:Define width in pixels

param.name: moduleclass_sfx
param.label: Module Class Suffix
param.description: A suffix to be applied to the css class of the module (table.moduletable), this allows individual module styling
